name: M9 Bayonet | Pink Power
description:
Pinky Knife - for those who value power!

This fantastic pink knife was once the dream of everyone from the candy-colored realm. Wielded by the best jumper, it added charm and respect, and took the breath away of anyone who laid eyes on it.

name: Flip Knife | Snow-white
description:
Snow-white Classic.

This is a knife for every beginner. It features a clean, classic style, and its white color symbolizes a blank slate and a fresh start.

name: The Developer Coin
description: Yes, I’m the developer of this little game xD There is only one such item in the world!

name: Champion at FASTHAND GDANSK 2025
description: This championship trophy was awarded to the Champion at The 2025 Gdansk Fasthand Championship. The Winner Team: mefyu, x2Mx, Shaddap

name: HVH VETERAN
description: This is a symbolic collectible item commemorating long-term presence and experience within the unofficial, community-driven part of the scene. It serves as a humorous reference to so-called “HVH” — an underground aspect of the game’s history that has, over the years, become part of internet folklore and memes associated with CS.

name: Genuine P250 | Duck Duck
description:
Autor : BlueAura - Seba .

Hand-painted and assembled P250 by an artist from Szczecin. The weapon stands out with its beautiful, distinctive color and a duck that will burn anyone who stands in its path with its breath.
